# daytona_region (Resource)

Manages a Daytona customer region.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "daytona_region" "example" {
  name = "example-region"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Region name.

### Optional

- `proxy_url` (String) Proxy URL for the region.
- `snapshot_manager_url` (String) Snapshot manager URL for the region.
- `ssh_gateway_url` (String) SSH gateway URL for the region.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Region creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Daytona region ID.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID that owns the region.
- `proxy_api_key` (String, Sensitive) Proxy API key returned when the region is created.
- `region_type` (String) Region type.
- `snapshot_manager_password` (String, Sensitive) Snapshot manager password returned when the region is created.
- `snapshot_manager_username` (String, Sensitive) Snapshot manager username returned when the region is created.
- `ssh_gateway_api_key` (String, Sensitive) SSH gateway API key returned when the region is created.
- `updated_at` (String) Region update timestamp.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import daytona_region.example "region-id"
```
